use_cases: Displaying a spending limit status or setting in a financial dashboard
Showing current vs. maximum spending in a banking or budgeting app
A card-based UI for financial management in fintech or SaaS products
Quick actions for spending control in mobile or web banking interfaces
ai_summary: A SpendingLimitCard component from lavikatiyar's card collection that displays financial spending information with a clean, minimalist card design. Features subtle shadows, rounded corners, and interactive button elements with hover states. Designed for fintech and SaaS platforms to showcase spending limits or financial status in a card-based UI layout that works across desktop and mobile platforms.
